steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content: The side lengths of parallelogram PQRS are $3$ times the corresponding side lengths of parallelogram ABCD. For similar figures, areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor.
steps.formula: $$\text{Area scales by } k^2 \text{ for scale factor } k$$

steps.title: Scale the area
steps.content: Use area scale factor $3^2=9$: $$ 24\cdot 9=216 $$ The answer is C.
